title: Land mines
description: This plugin add mines, with this plugin you can set mines with command or drop a mine (Plate)
body:
A simple plugin for add mines in minecraft full custom

Config: 
For exemple 
Portal:
  Name:
    type: SET
    World: world
    X: 37
    Y: 7
    Z:18

Project information:
This plugin add mines, with this plugin you can set mines with command or drop a mine (Plate)
How to use :

First of all :
Download the plugin 
Seconde :
Insert the plugin in the path plugins
Third :
Start your server and play !
